---
title: "Intermediate Tier"
subtitle: "20 weeks · Python · Independent Analyst"
---

## Overview

The Intermediate tier transitions residents from reproduction to independent analysis. Introduction to **prediction vs inference** as the central methodological distinction.

## Why Python?

The builder track opens at Intermediate. EHR wrangling, feature engineering, and prediction pipelines are better served by Python's ecosystem. `scikit-learn`, `lifelines`, `polars`, `shap` — no equivalent coherence in R for this workflow.

## Datasets

- VitalDB: Open access hemodynamic monitoring dataset
- eICU-CRD: PhysioNet credentialed critical care database

## Capstone

Quarto manuscript + reproducible Python pipeline using VitalDB or eICU.

## Modules

*Coming soon. Module structure: Week 1–20 with `index.qmd` (resident-facing) and `facilitator.qmd` (facilitator notes).*

---

[← Back to Home](../index.qmd)
